title: Bodø, Nordland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bodø, Nordland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bodø is a city in Nordland with a population of 52,000. A northern Norwegian city above the Arctic Circle, known for the Saltstraumen maelstrom and outdoor adventures.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
